author: Hung Manh Do
description_en: A little green dinosaur finds shiny treasures but learns that sharing makes everything more fun.
description_vi: Chú khủng long xanh nhỏ tìm thấy những kho báu lấp lánh nhưng học được rằng chia sẻ làm mọi thứ vui hơn.

pages.title_en: This is Dino. Dino is a little green dinosaur with a happy smile.
pages.title_vi: Đây là Dino. Dino là chú khủng long xanh nhỏ xinh với nụ cười thật tươi.
pages.prompt: A cute little green dinosaur with big friendly eyes standing in a sunny meadow, Pixar 3D animation style, child-friendly, soft warm lighting, lush green grass, shallow depth of field, beautiful nature background

pages.title_en: One morning, Dino found a shiny blue rock by the stream.
pages.title_vi: Một buổi sáng, Dino tìm thấy một viên đá xanh lấp lánh bên suối.
pages.prompt: A cute little green dinosaur with big friendly eyes looking at a shiny blue rock near a sparkling stream, Pixar 3D animation style, child-friendly, soft warm lighting, shallow depth of field, nature background

pages.title_en: Then Dino found a pretty yellow shell on the beach.
pages.title_vi: Rồi Dino tìm thấy một chiếc vỏ sò vàng xinh đẹp trên bãi biển.
pages.prompt: A cute little green dinosaur with big friendly eyes holding a pretty yellow seashell on a sunny beach, Pixar 3D animation style, child-friendly, soft warm lighting, shallow depth of field, ocean in background

pages.title_en: Dino found a red flower in the garden. So pretty!
pages.title_vi: Dino tìm thấy một bông hoa đỏ trong khu vườn. Đẹp quá!
pages.prompt: A cute little green dinosaur with big friendly eyes looking at a bright red flower in a colorful garden, Pixar 3D animation style, child-friendly, soft warm lighting, shallow depth of field, green grass background

pages.title_en: Dino put all his treasures in a big basket. 'All mine!' he said.
pages.title_vi: Dino bỏ tất cả kho báu vào một chiếc giỏ lớn. 'Của mình hết!' chú nói.
pages.prompt: A cute little green dinosaur with big friendly eyes holding a big woven basket full of colorful treasures including a blue rock, yellow shell, and red flower, Pixar 3D animation style, child-friendly, soft warm lighting, shallow depth of field

pages.title_en: Dino carried his basket all alone. It was very heavy.
pages.title_vi: Dino xách giỏ một mình. Giỏ rất nặng.
pages.prompt: A cute little green dinosaur with big friendly eyes struggling to carry a heavy basket full of treasures, arms straining, Pixar 3D animation style, child-friendly, soft warm lighting, shallow depth of field, forest path background

pages.title_en: Dino tripped. Oh no! His treasures rolled everywhere!
pages.title_vi: Dino bị vấp. Ôi không! Kho báu lăn đi khắp nơi!
pages.prompt: A cute little green dinosaur with big friendly eyes falling down, colorful treasures — blue rock, yellow shell, red flower — rolling and scattering in all directions, Pixar 3D animation style, child-friendly, soft warm lighting, dynamic action pose

pages.title_en: Dino sat down. He felt sad and all alone.
pages.title_vi: Dino ngồi xuống. Chú cảm thấy buồn và cô đơn.
pages.prompt: A cute little green dinosaur with big friendly eyes sitting on the ground looking sad, scattered colorful treasures around, Pixar 3D animation style, child-friendly, soft warm lighting, shallow depth of field, meadow background

pages.title_en: Then Bella Bunny hopped over. 'Can I help you, Dino?'
pages.title_vi: Rồi bạn Thỏ Bella nhảy tới. 'Mình giúp bạn nhé, Dino?'
pages.prompt: A cute little green dinosaur with big friendly eyes looking up at a cute fluffy white bunny with long ears who is hopping toward the scattered treasures, Pixar 3D animation style, child-friendly, soft warm lighting, shallow depth of field, meadow background

pages.title_en: Bella picked up the blue rock. 'This one is beautiful!' she said.
pages.title_vi: Bella nhặt viên đá xanh. 'Viên này đẹp quá!' bạn ấy nói.
pages.prompt: A cute fluffy white bunny with long ears holding up a shiny blue rock showing it to a cute little green dinosaur with big friendly eyes, both looking at the rock, Pixar 3D animation style, child-friendly, soft warm lighting, shallow depth of field

pages.title_en: Dino smiled. 'You can keep it, Bella!'
pages.title_vi: Dino cười. 'Bạn giữ lại nhé, Bella!'
pages.prompt: A cute little green dinosaur with big friendly eyes smiling and offering the shiny blue rock to a cute fluffy white bunny with long ears, both happy, Pixar 3D animation style, child-friendly, soft warm lighting, shallow depth of field

pages.title_en: Bella gave Dino the yellow shell. Friends share gifts!
pages.title_vi: Bella tặng Dino chiếc vỏ sò vàng. Bạn bè chia sẻ quà tặng!
pages.prompt: A cute fluffy white bunny with long ears handing a pretty yellow seashell to a cute little green dinosaur with big friendly eyes, both smiling and happy, Pixar 3D animation style, child-friendly, soft warm lighting, shallow depth of field

pages.title_en: More friends came. Everyone found something fun!
pages.title_vi: Thêm nhiều bạn đến. Mọi người đều tìm thấy thứ vui!
pages.prompt: A cute little green dinosaur with big friendly eyes surrounded by several cute animal friends — a bunny, a squirrel, and a duck — all happily looking at colorful scattered treasures in a sunny meadow, Pixar 3D animation style, child-friendly, soft warm lighting

pages.title_en: Dino gave the red flower to his friend Squirrel.
pages.title_vi: Dino tặng bông hoa đỏ cho bạn Sóc.
pages.prompt: A cute little green dinosaur with big friendly eyes handing a bright red flower to a cute little brown squirrel with a fluffy tail, both happy, Pixar 3D animation style, child-friendly, soft warm lighting, shallow depth of field

pages.title_en: 'Sharing is so much fun!' Dino cheered with all his friends.
pages.title_vi: 'Chia sẻ vui quá!' Dino reo vui cùng tất cả các bạn.
pages.prompt: A cute little green dinosaur with big friendly eyes cheering happily along with cute animal friends — bunny, squirrel, duck — all together in a sunny meadow with treasures shared around, Pixar 3D animation style, child-friendly, soft warm lighting, joyful atmosphere

pages.title_en: Dino learned that sharing makes everything better. The end.
pages.title_vi: Dino học được rằng chia sẻ làm mọi thứ tốt đẹp hơn. Hết rồi.
pages.prompt: A cute little green dinosaur with big friendly eyes sleeping peacefully under a starry sky with all friends — bunny, squirrel, duck — cuddled together, warm glowing fireflies, Pixar 3D animation style, child-friendly, soft warm lighting, magical bedtime atmosphere
